dct_title_s: Automobile routes from Needles to Williams. Part one, Needles to Kingman
dct_description_sm: Automobile Club of Southern California ; H.P.H.
Relief shown by hachures and text (road description and grade percentage).
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Oriented with north toward upper left.
Shows city plans, roads, railroads, waterways.
Indicates distances from Needles and Williams.
Numbered 105 in lower left, 1 in upper right, and 51 in bottom margin.
Belongs to a series of strip maps showing roads in California.
